## 2024-05-27 - Polars dictionary serialization optimization
**Learning:** Calling `.get()` and `.pop()` on every dictionary row generated by `.to_dicts()` inside large nested list-of-dictionary structures generates significant CPU and memory overhead during Python iterations.
**Action:** When serializing Polars DataFrames into nested dictionaries, extract the nested columns to lists via `.to_list()`, drop them from the main dataframe, execute `.to_dicts()` on the remaining flat columns, and update the nested keys/values back into the resulting output list concurrently using `zip()`. This approach is approximately 40% faster.
